hooks.command: sh -lc 'export PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1; ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; while [ ! -d "$ROOT/.codex/hooks" ] && [ "$ROOT" != "/" ]; do ROOT="$(dirname "$ROOT")"; done; exec python3 "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/session_start.py"'
hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE='1'; $root=(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>$null); if(-not $root){$root=(Get-Location).Path; while($root -and -not (Test-Path (Join-Path $root '.codex\hooks'))){$parent=Split-Path $root -Parent; if($parent -eq $root){break}; $root=$parent}}; py -3 (Join-Path $root '.codex\hooks\session_start.py')"

hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE='1'; $root=(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>$null); if(-not $root){$root=(Get-Location).Path; while($root -and -not (Test-Path (Join-Path $root '.codex\hooks'))){$parent=Split-Path $root -Parent; if($parent -eq $root){break}; $root=$parent}}; py -3 (Join-Path $root '.codex\hooks\user_prompt_submit.py')"
hooks.statusMessage: Screening user prompt for durable memory
